intro: Peucedanum boissieri, also known as Boissier's hog's fennel, is a perennial plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The health benefits of Peucedanum boissieri include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
